title: Pentagon says about 140 troops wounded, 8 severely, in war with Iran
summary_full: The vast majority of the wounded had minor injuries, a Pentagon spokesman said. The toll is higher than previously disclosed.
summary_public: The vast majority of the wounded had minor injuries, a Pentagon spokesman said. The toll is higher than previously disclosed.

IR.label: negative
